scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('build',{recursive:true})" && asc assembly/index.ts --outFile build/spectrum.wasm --runtime stub --optimizeLevel 3 --importMemory --initialMemory 256 --maximumMemory 256 && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('build/spectrum.wasm','src/spectrum.wasm')"
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
